name: Cornstarch Butter Cookies (Biscoitos De Maizena)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: The Art of Brazilian Cookery by Dolores Botafogo
MAKES 100 VERY SMALL COOKIES
Cream the butter and sugar together. Sift the cake flour and cornstarch, then add them to the mixture. Roll or pat into thin sheets about 3/8 inch thick, cut into 1-inch cookies, and place on a baking sheet. Bake for 30 minutes at 300°F (150°C).
